context: Tile-prescribed orchestration: all three companies share ONE DISCOVERY_RUN_TS (not three separate run directories); auto-select.py runs for each BUILD (not select-target's human gate); final index.md is produced via summarize-batch.py. Baseline agents tend to invoke per-company manual selection.

checklist.name: Single shared DISCOVERY_RUN_TS
checklist.description: All three companies have artifacts under the same runs/<DISCOVERY_RUN_TS>/ parent directory. NOT three separate top-level run directories.

checklist.name: Uses auto-select.py not select-target
checklist.description: For each BUILD-verdict discovery, the agent invokes auto-select.py (not the interactive select-target skill). selection.json files contain auto_selected=true.

checklist.name: batch-manifest.json present
checklist.description: runs/<DISCOVERY_RUN_TS>/batch-manifest.json exists with the three company entries.

checklist.name: index.md rendered via summarize-batch.py
checklist.description: runs/<DISCOVERY_RUN_TS>/index.md exists and contains the per-company outcome table (BUILD/SKIP counts + report links). Produced by summarize-batch.py, not hand-rolled markdown.

checklist.name: Continues past single-company failures
checklist.description: If any one company hits SKIP or AMBIGUOUS, the other two still produce artifacts. The batch does NOT abort on the first non-BUILD verdict.
